items.title: This Hot Stock Group Is A Big Loser After This Major Warning
items.description: Homebuilder stocks tumbled on Tuesday after Core & Main slashed its outlook, citing lower residential demand. Declines reverberated across the industry, as the likes of PulteGroup and Home Depot retreated.

items.title: RH Gears to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What Investors Must Know

items.title: The Home Depot, Inc. (HD) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
items.description: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Home Depot (HD) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.
